posts.author: Chetan213 (Chetan)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi All,
I have created a Invoice and Payment approval process in Monday.com, through automation it goes to various approvers at a click of button, for this purpose want to check Is there an App in market place on monday.com which when downloaded and installed can create a sequential flow for column for example your column is restricted until you have update first column second thrid etc
